heading: Transferred
label: 1201, 1202 Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 1201, , , ; , , ; , , , which provided for short title of chapter as the “Government Employee Rights Act of 1991”, provided purpose of chapter as establishing procedures to protect the rights of certain government employees with respect to their public employment, and defined “violation” for purposes of chapter, was transferred to , The Public Health and Welfare.Pub.
